title: 4 Pack 30cm Clear Plastic Ruler - 12 Inches Shatter Resistant Metric Transparent Straight Measuring Ruler Tool for Student School Office
features: Material: This transparent ruler with clear scale is made of high-quality plastic, strong and durable, can be used for a long time.
Multi-pack: Plastic ruler set includes 4 pcs 30cm/12inch rulers, a set of 8 rulers is enough for your daily measurement needs.
Feature: Straight rulers with accurate inch and centimeter dual-scales, can meet your different measurement requirements.
Design: Clear ruler with black printed scales can clearly display the measurement numbers and the words on the page, convenient to measure.
Wide Use: The ruler is widely used in in schools, math classes, office, home etc, perfect for students, teachers, artists, architects, workers.
description: Product Description High-quality Material Our transparent ruler is made of high-quality plastic, strong and durable. Be careful not to use too much force when bending. Multi-pack You will get 4pcs 30cm/12inch clear plastic rulers, a set of 4 rulers is enough for your daily measurement needs, can be used for a long time. Dual Scale Measurement Straight rulers with accurate inch and centimeter dual-scales, can meet your different measurement requirements. Clear Measurement Scale Clear ruler with black printed scales can clearly display the measurement numbers and the words on the page, convenient to measure. Measuring Length The plastic ruler can measure objects up to 12 inches or 30 cm long and can help you accurately draw straight lines. Convenient & Practical There are centimeter scales and inch scales on both sides of the ruler, and the transparent ruler can also see the text on the page through it during use. Practical Measuring Tool The ruler is widely used in in schools, math classes, office, home etc, perfect for students, teachers, artists, architects, workers.
